---
title: "EbuyEmporium - Customer Deduplication Report"
author: "Lebintiti Kobe"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


# Customers report 

```{r}
require(here)
require(tidyverse)
require(janitor)
require(gtExtras)

data <- read.csv(here("data/data_model.csv")) %>% as_tibble()

data%>%
  count(is_registered,is_guest,in_purchase)%>%
  mutate(percentage = (n/sum(n))*100)%>%
  gt()%>%
  fmt_percent(percentage,decimals = 2,scale_values = F)%>%
  gt::grand_summary_rows(c(n,percentage),list(Total=~sum(.)))%>%
  gt_theme_538()%>%
  tab_options(table.width = pct(80)) %>%
  gtsave(filename = "customer_report.png",path = here("images/"))
```
